Clarity.justification: The generated diagram contains a syntax error message and lacks any visual representation of the architecture. It is not understandable to stakeholders as it does not display any components, symbols, or connections.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is missing all elements from the ground truth diagram. There are no components, connections, or labels present, making it completely incomplete.

Consistency.justification: There is no consistency to evaluate as the generated diagram does not contain any elements from the ground truth diagram. It only shows a syntax error message, indicating a failure to generate the intended diagram.
